profile.name: Nirmit Shah
profile.title: Full-Stack Developer
profile.intro: I'm a software engineer driven by curiosity, innovation, and the art of problem-solving. I love transforming complex challenges into elegant, high-performance code and crafting products that make a real impact.
profile.passion: My passion lies at the intersection of creativity and engineering — from architecting scalable systems to designing seamless user experiences. I thrive on exploring new technologies, experimenting with ideas, and pushing boundaries in how software can shape the world.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Software Engineering
Bachelor of Engineering in Information Technology

highlights: Engineered SaaS publishing workflow in React integrating Java-based SOAP APIs, automating publisher submissions and owner approvals across microservices.
Developed reusable npm libraries to standardize UI components, reducing repetitive frontend effort by 20%.
Converted Figma prototypes into a responsive Next.js web app using Strapi CMS and IIS deployment, increasing user acquisition by 25%.
Implemented OAuth 2.0 + JWT authentication in Node.js, improving session persistence & data security.
Enhanced test coverage by 20% through 12+ new automation scripts and optimized 163+ feature validation tests via Jenkins.
Mentored 200+ students in Human-Centered Design and Interaction Design.
Led hands-on Figma workshops on Design Systems, Auto-Layout, Component Architecture, and Design Tokens.
Conducted high-fidelity prototyping sessions on micro-interactions, motion design, and WCAG accessibility.
Delivered heuristic evaluations and design critiques to improve usability and visual hierarchy.
Collaborated with faculty on curriculum modules focused on modern UI/UX methodologies.
Architected a pre-login Next.js portal using Ant Design UI, improving UI responsiveness by 30%.
Integrated CSV-based pipelines for SSG, improving data loading speed and accuracy by 25%.
Migrated legacy .NET portal to React.js (ES6) using Hooks, improving maintainability by 33%.
Implemented GitLab CI/CD pipelines to automate React builds and accelerate deployments by 25%.
Delivered 34+ Highcharts visualizations with Java backend endpoints, achieving 99% cross-browser responsiveness.
Built instructional web platform with Laravel and PHP implementing secure authentication.
Developed backend with Laravel MVC, integrated REST APIs, and managed MySQL DB.
Optimized database performance with indexing while maintaining Git-based version control.

projects.title: Credit-Card-Fraud-Detection
projects.description: Machine learning-powered Flask web app predicting fraudulent transactions in real time.

projects.description: iOS application with real-time file sharing using SwiftUI and Figma-designed UI.
